project_path.description: Path to .csproj or .sln file (optional, uses current directory if omitted)
Path to .csproj or .sln file (optional, uses current directory if omitted)
Path to test .csproj file (optional, uses current directory if omitted)

filter.description: Filter expression to run specific tests (e.g., 'FullyQualifiedName~MyTest')

no_build.description: Skip building the project before testing

dotnet_format.description: Format .NET code according to style rules

project_path.description: Path to .csproj or .sln file (optional, uses current directory if omitted)

verify_no_changes.description: Verify no formatting changes are needed (non-zero exit code if formatting required)

directory.description: Path to git repository directory (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Defaults to current directory.

git_diff.description: Show changes between commits, commit and working tree, etc

directory.description: Path to git repository directory (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Defaults to current directory.

git_current_branch.description: Get the name of the current git branch

directory.description: Path to git repository directory (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Defaults to current directory.

git_commit.description: Commit all changes with a message. Automatically formats commit with issue number and Copilot tag: [#123][Copilot] message

issue_number.description: Issue/work item number to link this commit to

directory.description: Path to git repository directory (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Defaults to current directory.

file_path.description: Path to file or directory to stage (use '.' for all changes, or './Services/file.cs' for submodules)

directory.description: Path to git repository directory to operate from (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Optional - if omitted, file_path can include submodule paths.

git_unstage.description: Unstage files (remove from staging area but keep changes)

file_path.description: Path to file or directory to unstage (use '.' for all staged files, or './Services/file.cs' for submodules)

directory.description: Path to git repository directory to operate from (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Optional - if omitted, file_path can include submodule paths.

git_restore.description: Restore file(s) to a specific commit (defaults to HEAD/last commit)

file_path.description: Path to file or directory to restore (can include submodule paths like './Services/file.cs')

directory.description: Path to git repository directory to operate from (for submodules, e.g., './Services'). Optional - if omitted, file_path can include submodule paths.

commit.description: Commit hash or reference to restore from (e.g., 'HEAD', 'HEAD~1', commit SHA). Defaults to HEAD if omitted.

git_push.description: Push current branch to origin (safeguarded - checks for uncommitted changes and prevents pushing scratchpad branches)

directory.description: Path to git repository directory (defaults to current directory)

path.description: Path to directory or file (optional, uses current directory if omitted)

sort_by_time.description: Sort by modification time, newest first

sort_by_size.description: Sort by file size, largest first

file_path.description: Path to the file to delete

delete_directory.description: Delete a directory and its contents

directory_path.description: Path to the directory to delete

mkdir.description: Create a directory and all necessary parent directories in the path

directory_path.description: Path to the directory to create (creates all parent directories as needed)

verbose.description: Print a message for each created directory

mode.description: Set file mode (permissions) in octal format (e.g., '755', '700')

mv.description: Move or rename a file or directory

source.description: Path to the source file or directory

destination.description: Path to the destination file or directory

force.description: Force move without prompting before overwriting

no_clobber.description: Do not overwrite an existing file

verbose.description: Print source and destination for each move

wc.description: Count the number of lines in a file

file_path.description: Path to the file to count lines in

sed.description: Stream editor for filtering and transforming text - primarily for find/replace operations

file_path.description: Path to file to process (omit to process stdin)

apply_changes.description: Apply changes to file in place (default is dry-run to stdout)

backup_suffix.description: When applying changes, create backup with this suffix (e.g., '.bak')

pattern.description: Pattern to search for (can be a regular expression)

file_path.description: Path to file or directory to search in (omit to search stdin)

ignore_case.description: Ignore case distinctions in pattern and data

only_count.description: Only print count of matching lines per file

filenames_only.description: Only print names of files with matches

context.description: Print number of lines of context around matches (e.g., 3 shows 3 lines before and after)

az_devops_get_work_item.description: Get work item details including description and acceptance criteria from Azure DevOps

az_devops_get_pull_requests.description: Get open pull requests for a repository with their associated branch names

az_devops_get_pr_comments.description: Get unresolved comment threads for a pull request including file paths and line numbers

az_devops_list_repos.description: List Azure DevOps repositories that agents are allowed to access
